title: CobbleValley
description: A custom Cobblemon Modpack for the CobbleValley Server
body:
A custom Cobblemon Modpack for our CobbleValley Server.

🌄 Welcome to CobbleValley! 🌄

Looking for a fresh Cobblemon adventure? We have opened our CobbleValley server not long ago and would love you to join us!

✨ What’s waiting in the Valley:
    •    🌍 Tons of biomes to explore with endless discoveries
    •    🏞️ A cozy community from the very start
    •    ⚔️ Gym challenges, tournaments & events (once we settle in!)
    •    🧱 Building, trading & exploring together
    •    🎮 Casual AND competitive battles
    •    🚫 100% No pay to win everyone’s on equal ground

Whether you want to become a champion, fill your Pokédex, or just vibe with friends CobbleValley is the perfect place to start. 

Credits -
Emote Craft - https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft
Mythic Upgrades - https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-upgrades
Pure Amethyst Tools - https://modrinth.com/mod/pureamethysttools
Pokeblocks - https://modrinth.com/mod/pokeblocks
Explorify - https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify
